requirements.text: The supplier shall hold a valid ISO 9001 certification at the time of tender submission.
requirements.source_excerpt: Bidders shall hold a valid ISO 9001 certification at the point of submission. Failure to evidence this will result in the bid being rejected.

requirements.text: The supplier must hold employer's liability insurance of at least £5,000,000.
requirements.source_excerpt: The supplier must hold employer's liability insurance of at least £5,000,000.

requirements.text: The supplier should provide a dedicated account manager for the contract term.
requirements.source_excerpt: The supplier should provide a dedicated account manager for the duration of the contract term.

requirements.text: The supplier must demonstrate an annual turnover of at least £2,000,000.
requirements.source_excerpt: minimum annual turnover of £2,000,000 over each of the last two financial years

requirements.text: The supplier shall provide three case studies of comparable public-sector contracts.
requirements.source_excerpt: Bidders shall provide three case studies of comparable public-sector contracts delivered in the last five years.
